default: The Shattering took everything but our stubbornness, traveler.
q_clear_the_hollow.offer: The husks press closer each dusk. Thin them, and bring proof of the old seal.
q_clear_the_hollow.active: The seal still holds — barely. Keep at it.
q_clear_the_hollow.turnin: You found it. Then you are the one the Vault has been waiting for. Take this seal.
q_silence_the_king.offer: Beneath the Sunken Vault he waits. End his vigil, and the realm may breathe again.
q_silence_the_king.turnin: It is done. The dawn feels different already. Thank you.

default: Bring me husk shards and I'll see what the forge remembers.
q_smith_bounty.offer: Those hounds gnaw my traps to ruin. Two pelts and this Greater Salve is yours — no obligation.
q_smith_bounty.active: Two hounds. The salve's still here when you're done.
q_smith_bounty.turnin: Clean work. The forge remembers you kindly.
